steps.title: Track the emotional signal
steps.content: The passage says the frieze has emotional power because its age creates a link of shared humanity with the artist across many generations. The blank must describe that moving emotional quality.

steps.title: Separate emotion from craft
steps.content: Choice A refers to condition, not emotional force. Choice B refers to careful execution. Choice D refers to clever design. The remaining word means emotionally moving, matching the frieze's resonance. The answer is C.
